children.heading: Promulgation
children.label: 1 Promulgation
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the Secretary shall initiate procedures under subchapter III of chapter 5 of title 5 to negotiate and promulgate such regulations as are necessary to carry out this subchapter.October 21, 2020

children.heading: Publication of proposed regulations
children.label: 2 Publication of proposed regulations
children.text: Proposed regulations to implement this subchapter shall be published in the Federal Register not later than 38 months after .October 21, 2020

children.heading: Expiration of authority
children.label: 3 Expiration of authority
children.text: The authority to promulgate regulations under paragraph (1) shall expire on the date that is 50 months after .October 21, 2020

children.heading: Membership
children.label: 1 Membership
children.text: A negotiated rulemaking committee established pursuant to to carry out this section shall have as its members only representatives of the Federal Government and Tribal government.section 565 of title 5

children.heading: Lead agency
children.label: 2 Lead agency
children.text: Among the Federal representatives described in paragraph (1), the Office of Self-Governance shall be the lead agency for the Department.

children.heading: Adaptation of procedures
children.label: c Adaptation of procedures
children.text: The Secretary shall adapt the negotiated rulemaking procedures to the unique context of self-governance and the government-to-government relationship between the United States and Indian Tribes.

children.heading: Repeal
children.label: 1 Repeal
children.text: The Secretary may repeal any regulation that is inconsistent with this chapter.

children.heading: Conflicting provisions
children.label: 2 Conflicting provisions
children.text: Subject to section 101(a) of the PROGRESS for Indian Tribes Act and except with respect to programs described under , this subchapter shall supersede any conflicting provision of law (including any conflicting regulations).section 5363(c) of this title

children.heading: Effectiveness without regard to regulations
children.label: 3 Effectiveness without regard to regulations
children.text: The lack of promulgated regulations on an issue shall not limit the effect or implementation of this subchapter.
